qa_pairs.question: What are the essential software modules loaded for OpenMPI when configuring a machine with CESM, according to the provided configuration details?
qa_pairs.answer: The essential software modules loaded for OpenMPI include `openmpi/4.1.5`, `hdf5-mpi/1.14.2`, `netcdf-c++4-mpi/4.3.1`, `netcdf-fortran-mpi/4.6.1`, `netcdf-mpi/4.9.2`, `xml-libxml/2.0208`, and `flexiblas/3.3.1`.

qa_pairs.question: Which environment variables are specifically configured for NetCDF paths in the machine setup, and what are their respective values?
qa_pairs.answer: The environment variables configured for NetCDF paths are `NETCDF_PATH` set to `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/easybuild/software/2023/x86-64-v4/MPI/intel2023/openmpi4/pnetcdf/1.12.3`, `NETCDF_FORTRAN_PATH` set to `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/easybuild/software/2023/x86-64-v4/MPI/intel2023/openmpi4/netcdf-fortran-mpi/4.6.1/`, and `NETCDF_C_PATH` set to `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/easybuild/software/2023/x86-64-v4/MPI/intel2023/openmpi4/netcdf-c++4-mpi/4.3.1/`.
